title: marina gracilis
intro: Marina gracilis, also known as Sea Holly, is a type of plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Marina gracilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Marina gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
